prompt: Determine whether this termination can be accepted from the evidence provided. If not, state exactly what verification is required.
scenario: A photo shows feeder lugs in a disconnect, conductors fully seated with correct strip length and no visible strand damage. Nothing in the photo or the provided paperwork indicates whether the lugs were torqued to the marked values, and no torque marks or record sheet is included.
title: T2 E-303 Termination torque unverifiable
